title: Anonymous Classes Should Not Exceed Defined Line Limit
description: Anonymous classes are useful for injecting behavior without creating a separate class. However, these should be limited to a few lines of code to maintain readability. Excessive lines in an anonymous class can make the code difficult to understand.
recommendation: Refactor anonymous classes with many lines into separate dedicated classes. This will enhance code readability and maintainability.
impact: Improves code readability and maintainability. Prevents code bloat and complexity.

checks.message: Anonymous class exceeds allowed line limit (10 lines).
